name: Order Express - Kansas City Independence Check Cashing
description_short: Order Express is a multi-service financial company offering check cashing, money transfers, money orders, bill payments, and additional services at 70+ branches across 25 states.
description_long:
Order Express Inc. was founded in 1993 as a Mexican-owned company operating under U.S. laws and regulations. The company was established to serve Latino immigrant communities, beginning with its first branch in Chicago, Illinois. As of January 2021, Order Express operates as a regulated entity in 25 states with over 70 company-owned branches and authorized agents, making it a substantial regional player in alternative financial services.

The Kansas City - Independence location offers a comprehensive suite of financial services including check cashing, money transfers, money orders, bill payment, currency exchange, phone top-up, plane ticket sales, courier services, Bitcoin ATM kiosks, title loans, and vehicle-related services. The branch operates extended hours (9 AM–8:15 PM weekdays, 10 AM–7 PM Sunday) at 3827 Independence Avenue. Customer service is available in both English and Spanish.

Order Express distinguishes itself through bilingual customer service, extended operating hours, a broad range of ancillary services beyond check cashing, and a loyalty program. The company maintains a 4.6-star Google rating with customer testimonials highlighting polite, intelligent, and friendly service. The presence of Bitcoin ATM kiosks and courier services sets them apart from traditional check-cashing operations.

As a check-cashing service, Order Express does not provide traditional banking products like savings accounts, credit products, or loans—with the exception of title loans at select locations. Customers should verify specific service availability and fee structures at individual branches, as the website does not disclose check cashing fees or service charges. The company's primary focus remains on serving immigrant communities and unbanked populations seeking basic financial services.
pros: Extended hours until 8:15 PM weekdays and 10 AM–7 PM Sunday, accommodating working customers
Bilingual customer service in English and Spanish at the Kansas City location
Broad service menu beyond check cashing: money transfers, money orders, bill payment, currency exchange, phone top-up, courier services, Bitcoin ATMs, and plane tickets
Established presence with 70+ company-owned branches across 25 regulated states as of 2021
4.6-star Google rating with verified customer testimonials praising customer service quality
Loyalty program available for repeat customers
Multiple phone numbers for customer support: 1-888-666-1602 and 1-312-235-5200
cons: Website does not disclose check cashing fees, percentage rates, or service charges for any services
Limited transparency on required identification documents or eligibility requirements for check cashing
Title loans offered at select locations only—availability not confirmed for Kansas City - Independence branch
No online check cashing or mobile app mentioned; services require in-person branch visits
Website lacks information about check processing times or check amount limits
best_for: Spanish-speaking customers and Latino immigrants requiring multilingual financial services
Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing check cashing combined with money transfer services
International remittance senders seeking reliable money transfer to multiple countries
Customers needing extended-hours access to check cashing and ancillary financial services
diagnosis: Order Express is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers—particularly Spanish-speaking immigrants—who need check cashing combined with money transfer and ancillary services. The main caveat is the complete absence of fee disclosure on the website; customers must call or visit in person to understand the actual cost of services before using them.
